name: Append verified backend engineer
job_description:
Company: LumenForge
Job Title: Backend Engineer
Location: Remote worldwide
LumenForge is a remote-first infrastructure company building developer platforms for climate analytics teams. Global applicants are welcome and contractor arrangements are supported where local payroll is unavailable. Salary: USD $118,000-$152,000 per year. Responsibilities: you will build Python APIs, own PostgreSQL services, improve CI/CD reliability, collaborate with product managers, and document production operations. Required skills: Python, TypeScript, SQL, Docker, AWS, API development, communication. Experience with distributed systems, monitoring, and production support is valued. Benefits include paid time off, home office budget, learning stipend, wellness support, and async working norms. Interview process: recruiter screen, technical interview, architecture discussion, team interview. Apply at https://jobs.greenhouse.io/lumenforge/jobs/backend-engineer-global-2026-v2

name: Append verified data analyst
job_description:
Company: Harbor Insights
Job Title: Data Analyst
Location: Work from anywhere, worldwide
Harbor Insights is an async analytics team helping logistics companies understand operational performance. This is a fully remote role open to global applicants. Salary: USD $82,000-$108,000. Responsibilities: build SQL models, create dashboards, analyze product usage, present insights to customers, and partner with engineering on data quality. Required skills: SQL, Python, data analysis, Excel, analytics, communication, API literacy. Timezone requirements: four hours UTC overlap preferred. Benefits include paid time off, home office stipend, learning budget, and flexible schedules. Interview process: recruiter screen, SQL exercise, analytics case discussion, final team interview. Apply at https://jobs.lever.co/harborinsights/data-analyst-remote-global-2026

name: Append verified customer success manager
job_description:
Company: OrbitCare
Job Title: Customer Success Manager
Location: Remote worldwide
OrbitCare builds care coordination software for distributed nonprofit teams. Global applicants are welcome, and contractor-friendly arrangements are available. Salary: USD $76,000-$102,000. Responsibilities: onboard customers, lead business reviews, identify expansion opportunities, document product feedback, coordinate with support, and improve customer health reporting. Required skills: SaaS customer success, communication, analytics, CRM tools, project management, data analysis. Benefits include paid time off, wellness stipend, home office budget, learning budget, and remote-first team rituals. Interview process: recruiter screen, customer scenario interview, team interview, final interview. Apply at https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/orbitcare/customer-success-manager-global-2026

name: Append rejected payment scam
job_description:
Job Title: Remote Data Entry Cashflow Assistant
Urgent hiring immediately. Earn $700/day from home with no interview and no experience needed. Kindly send your personal details and pay for training. You must send money for an equipment fee by wire transfer before onboarding. Contact the recruiter on Telegram or WhatsApp only. Gift cards accepted. Guaranteed income.
